Off Calendar Sep-09-2013 Continued To Sep-30-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Debra Dolch (Trustee).

Mr. Der stated that the accounting is finished and that he will file it by the end of the week. The matter was continued to September 30, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (116-118 Turk St. S,F.)
Off Calendar Dec-06-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Debra Dolch.

The sale was confirmed at $1,628,000.00 to Ashok Patel and Shantaben Desai represented by Realtor Daniel Chein based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed November 8, 2012. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to receipt and review of the order). Bond is not required.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Benton.
